title: xbtlin/ai-berkshire
friendlyTitle: AI Berkshire is a structured AI research workflow for investing
summary: AI Berkshire is a Claude Code-based value-investing research framework that turns investor methodologies into structured skills, multi-agent research flows, checklists, and financial-rigor tooling. It emphasizes adversarial analysis, explicit decision outputs, and cross-checking calculations rather than simple prompt-and-answer research.
friendlySummary: This project uses Claude Code and multiple AI agents to produce more disciplined value-investing research.
whyItMatters: The repo is useful as a template for domain-specific agent workflows: encode expert methods, force structured conclusions, run parallel perspectives, and add calculation checks. Even outside investing, it shows how to turn a fuzzy research process into repeatable AI-assisted work.
friendlyWhyItMatters: Use it as inspiration for building repeatable research systems where AI must compare evidence, challenge assumptions, and show its work.
